title: cyathea munita
intro: Cyathea munita, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and Australia. The Black Tree Fern has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's leaves have been used in traditional medicine to provide relief from coughs and colds, and to promote overall respiratory health. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as being dried and used in capsules or tinctures for its medicinal benefits.
